name: @trailblaze/trailrunner-web
description: Type-check toolchain for the Trail Runner web UI. The UI itself has NO bundler and NO npm deps at runtime — it loads React/CodeMirror/etc. as UMD globals from a CDN and is transpiled in-browser by Babel-standalone. These devDependencies exist ONLY so `tsc --noEmit` can type-check the .tsx source (see tsconfig.check.json + types/globals.d.ts). node_modules is gitignored and excluded from the packaged jar.
